sourceMode: Build-time RSS scraper for static GitHub Pages.
rightsNote: Attribution-only feed: titles, short excerpts, source labels, links, and available media thumbnails. GTA Money Team does not republish full articles.

officialWatchlist.title: Grand Theft Auto VI Official Hub
officialWatchlist.note: Use as the first source before teaching release, edition, platform, or story claims.

officialWatchlist.title: Take-Two News Releases
officialWatchlist.note: Use for investor literacy, earnings catalysts, and official corporate announcements.

items.title: Claims about GTA 6 pre-orders are incorrect and "absurd", analyst firm says, but it's still had the "strongest pre-order campaign ever recorded"
items.excerpt: We all knew that GTA 6 was going to be big, but new data from a video game market data analyst group suggests Rockstar's upcoming sandbox game has already earned in excess of $260m for the company.
items.moneyAngle: Use this for legal preorder guides, affiliate shopping comparisons, and launch-week buyer education.

items.title: GTA 5 had "so much" cut content, including minigames that were almost "completely done," former Rockstar dev says: "They'll throw out entire levels"
items.excerpt: Rockstar Games apparently isn't scared to kill its darling
items.moneyAngle: Brief the crew on what changed, what is official, and what content or training update should ship next.

items.title: Grand Theft Auto 6 leaker who was given an indefinite sentence in 2023 because he wouldn't stop hacking is now out of hospital and awaiting retrial
items.excerpt: Arion Kurtaj, a member of the Lapsus$ hacking group, was behind a 2022 hack of Rockstar that revealed GTA 6 to the world more than a year before it was announced.
items.moneyAngle: Use this as a scam/firewall lesson: verify the claim, avoid leaks, and teach members source discipline.

items.title: "It's not that we don't care about PC" - Former Rockstar developer suggests why GTA 6 is only coming to consoles at launch
items.excerpt: GTA 6 is looming like that monolith in 2001: A Space Odyssey, casting its fearsome shadow over the games industry and probably also scaring some monkeys. But PC players won't be able to join in the fun when Rockstar Games' mega-sequel launches on 19th November
items.moneyAngle: Brief the crew on what changed, what is official, and what content or training update should ship next.
